title: Which "word" became flesh?
author: joshualinog
tags: Foolish gospel | Messiah failed | weakness of God
The Gospel of John the son of Zebedee
labels: Foolish gospel | Messiah failed | weakness of God
The Gospel of John the son of Zebedee
excerpt: John 1:14 SBLGNT Καὶ ὁ λόγος σὰρξ ἐγένετο καὶ ἐσκήνωσεν ἐν ἡμῖν, καὶ ἐθεασάμεθα τὴν δόξαν αὐτοῦ, δόξαν ὡς μονογενοῦς παρὰ πατρός, πλήρης χάριτος καὶ ἀληθείας· YLT And the Word became flesh, and did ta
body:
John 1:14
SBLGNT Καὶ ὁ λόγος σὰρξ ἐγένετο καὶ ἐσκήνωσεν ἐν ἡμῖν, καὶ ἐθεασάμεθα τὴν δόξαν αὐτοῦ, δόξαν ὡς μονογενοῦς παρὰ πατρός, πλήρης χάριτος καὶ ἀληθείας·
YLT And the Word became flesh, and did tabernacle among us, and we beheld his glory, glory as of an only begotten of a father, full of grace and truth.
LEB And the Word became flesh and took up residence among us, and we saw his glory, glory as of the one and only from the Father, full of grace and truth.


- how use this verse to evangelize?

- [ ] there are 31,101 verses in Scripture. did all these words become flesh? 
- [ ] to express all this in ONE word : LOVE
- [ ] how express all this in one sentence?
content:
John 1:14
SBLGNT Καὶ ὁ λόγος σὰρξ ἐγένετο καὶ ἐσκήνωσεν ἐν ἡμῖν, καὶ ἐθεασάμεθα τὴν δόξαν αὐτοῦ, δόξαν ὡς μονογενοῦς παρὰ πατρός, πλήρης χάριτος καὶ ἀληθείας·
YLT And the Word became flesh, and did tabernacle among us, and we beheld his glory, glory as of an only begotten of a father, full of grace and truth.
LEB And the Word became flesh and took up residence among us, and we saw his glory, glory as of the one and only from the Father, full of grace and truth.


- how use this verse to evangelize?

- [ ] there are 31,101 verses in Scripture. did all these words become flesh?
